================================================================================
                   COPY-PASTE SETUP FOR VPS SSH KEY
================================================================================

STATUS: You are already logged into VPS! ✅

Next Step: Copy-paste the command below into your VPS terminal:

================================================================================

mkdir -p ~/.ssh && chmod 700 ~/.ssh && echo 'ssh-rsa  workgrid@152.42.229.212' >> ~/.ssh/authorized_keys && chmod 600 ~/.ssh/authorized_keys && echo "✅ SSH Key Setup Complete!" && echo "" && echo "Test: Exit terminal and run:" && echo "ssh -i C:\Users\PC\.ssh\workgrid_vps root@152.42.229.212"

================================================================================

What this command does:
1. Creates ~/.ssh directory
2. Sets correct permissions (700)
3. Adds the public key to authorized_keys
4. Sets correct permissions on authorized_keys (600)
5. Confirms setup is complete

================================================================================

After running the command:
1. Type: exit
2. Test SSH connection: ssh -i C:\Users\PC\.ssh\workgrid_vps root@152.42.229.212

Should connect WITHOUT asking for password! ✅

================================================================================
